meaning: Parents' National Educational Union (英国) 全国家长教育联合会
examples: This seems to have gotten mixed up with another Indo-European word pneu meaning "to breathe" and eventually to have made it to Greek as pneumon meaning "lungs."
This article also introduces the control ways and testing principles of its mechanical structure, pneu-matic system and electrical system. It tells how to design its fixture and terminal.
